titleStmt.title: SII 9.396: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 396. (A.R. No. 364 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE PRAKARA OF THE KUNDESVARA TEMPLE AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1184, Dundubhi, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 13, Ādivāra corresponding to A.D. 1262 August 13, Sunday in the reign of Paṭṭamahādēvi and king Pāṇḍyadēv-Āḷpēndradēvarasa. Voḍḍamadēva, Narasiṅga-Heggaḍe and other officers are stated to have fixed the revenue of Kundāpura at gadyāṇas 140. The king and Paṭṭamahādēvi are said to have been ruling at Bārahakanyāpura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ)namaḥ . svasti śrī
matpaṭamahādēviyaruṁ śrīmatpāṁḍyadēvā
ḷvēṁdradēvarasara vijayarājyamuttarōtta
rābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁbaraṁ salutamirda sakavaruṣada
1184 duṁdubhisaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa
bahuḷa 17 Ādivāra sihvamāsa 16 Ā .
śrīmadurājadhāni bārahakaṁnyā
puradaramaneyalu sthirasihvāsanā
rūḍharāgi vaḍḍōlagaṁgoṭṭiralu
śrīpādasaṁnidhānadalu voḍḍamadē
va narasiṁgaheggaḍe kōṭiyaḍeha
llakheyasēnabōva yadhikāriti nācivuṁ
dēsipuruṣaru yiralu ku,dāpu
radagrāmake varuṣavondakke yikuva
samudāya gadyāṇaṁ . 140 Eṁ
du barada kalu yidakkeyarasu pradhā
naru yadhikāri grāmaṇigaḷu Ā
robbaruṁ yilleṁdarādaḍe gaṁge
vāraṇāsiya taḍiyalu gōThe slab is built in after this.
Digital edition of SII 9.396 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
